sentences.target: Ich lese das Kapitel heute Abend.

translations.de: Ich lese das Kapitel heute Abend.
translations.en: I'm reading the chapter this evening.
translations.fr: Je lis le chapitre ce soir.
translations.ko: 오늘 저녁에 그 장을 읽을 거예요.
translations.pt: Vou ler o capítulo hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi sẽ đọc chương này.
translations.el: Θα διαβάσω το κεφάλαιο σήμερα το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Jeg skal lese kapitlet i kveld.
translations.id: Malam ini saya akan membaca bab itu.
translations.sv: Jag ska läsa kapitlet i kväll.
translations.ja: 今夜その章を読みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the finite verb 'lese'.
Main lexical verb, finite, present indicative, 1st person singular; V2 position; takes the accusative object 'das Kapitel'.
Definite article, neuter, accusative singular; determiner of 'Kapitel' as the direct object.
Noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'lese'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; part of the adverbial time expression 'heute Abend'.
Noun, masculine, accusative singular; functions as a temporal adverbial in the fixed expression 'heute Abend'.

sentences.target: Im Unterricht bespreche ich das Kapitel morgen.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈʊntɐʁɪçt bəˈʃpʁɛçə ɪç das kaˈpiːtəl ˈmɔʁɡn̩/

translations.de: Im Unterricht bespreche ich das Kapitel morgen.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈʊntɐʁɪçt bəˈʃpʁɛçə ɪç das kaˈpiːtəl ˈmɔʁɡn̩/
translations.en: I'll discuss the chapter in class tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana en clase hablaré del capítulo.
translations.fr: Demain en cours, je parlerai du chapitre.
translations.it: Domani in classe parlerò del capitolo.
translations.ko: 내일 수업 시간에 그 장에 대해 이야기할 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天上课时我会讨论这一章。
translations.yue: 我聽日喺課堂會討論呢一章。
translations.ru: Завтра на занятии я обсужу главу.
translations.pt: Amanhã na aula vou falar sobre o capítulo.
translations.he: מחר בשיעור אני אדבר על הפרק.
translations.vi: Ngày mai ở lớp tôi sẽ thảo luận về chương này.
translations.nl: Morgen in de klas bespreek ik het hoofdstuk.
translations.uk: Завтра на уроці я обговорю розділ.
translations.hu: Holnap az órán megbeszélem a fejezetet.
translations.hi: मैं कल कक्षा में अध्याय पर चर्चा करूँगा.
translations.el: Αύριο στην τάξη θα συζητήσω το κεφάλαιο.
translations.nb: I morgen i timen skal jeg snakke om kapitlet.
translations.id: Besok di kelas saya akan membahas bab itu.
translations.sv: I morgon på lektionen ska jag prata om kapitlet.
translations.ro: Mâine la clasă voi discuta capitolul.
translations.da: I morgen i timen taler jeg om kapitlet.
translations.ja: 明日の授業でその章について話します。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; contraction of 'in dem'; heads the fronted PP 'Im Unterricht' (sets verb-second word order).
Noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'Im'.
Main verb, finite, present indicative, 1st person singular; placed in V2 due to the initial PP; selects the accusative object 'das Kapitel'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject, post-verbal due to inversion (V2).
Definite article, neuter, accusative singular; determiner of the direct object 'Kapitel'.
Noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'bespreche'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time of the discussion.

translations.ja: その章は本当に面白かった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter, nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Kapitel'.
Noun, neuter, nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite copula, past (preterite), 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb functioning as an intensifier; modifies the predicate adjective 'spannend'.
Predicate adjective, positive degree; complements the copula 'war' to describe the subject.

sentences.target: Mit dem Umzug beginnt ein neues Kapitel.
sentences.reading: /mɪt deːm ˈʊmtsuːk bəˈɡɪnt aɪ̯n ˈnɔʏəs kaˈpiːtəl/

translations.de: Mit dem Umzug beginnt ein neues Kapitel.
translations.ipa: /mɪt deːm ˈʊmtsuːk bəˈɡɪnt aɪ̯n ˈnɔʏəs kaˈpiːtəl/
translations.en: With the move, a new chapter begins.
translations.es: Con la mudanza empieza un nuevo capítulo.
translations.fr: Avec le déménagement, un nouveau chapitre commence.
translations.it: Con il trasloco inizia un nuovo capitolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 随着搬家，一个新的篇章开始了。
translations.yue: 搬屋之後，一個新篇章開始咗。
translations.pt: Com a mudança, começa um novo capítulo.
translations.tr: Taşınmayla birlikte yeni bir bölüm başlıyor.
translations.vi: Với việc chuyển nhà, một chương mới bắt đầu.
translations.nl: Met de verhuizing begint een nieuw hoofdstuk.
translations.hu: A költözéssel egy új fejezet kezdődik.
translations.hi: घर बदलने से एक नया अध्याय शुरू होता है.
translations.pl: Z przeprowadzką zaczyna się nowy rozdział.
translations.el: Με τη μετακόμιση αρχίζει ένα νέο κεφάλαιο.
translations.nb: Med flyttingen starter et nytt kapittel.
translations.id: Dengan pindah rumah, bab baru dimulai.
translations.sv: Med flytten börjar ett nytt kapitel.
translations.ro: Odată cu mutarea începe un nou capitol.
translations.da: Med flytningen begynder et nyt kapitel.
translations.ja: 引っ越しで新しい章が始まります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; heads the fronted PP 'Mit dem Umzug', giving circumstance.
Definite article, masculine, dative singular; determiner of 'Umzug' within the PP.
Noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'Mit'.
Main verb, finite, present indicative, 3rd person singular; V2 after the initial PP; the subject follows ('ein neues Kapitel').
Indefinite article, neuter, nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Kapitel'.
Attributive adjective, nominative neuter singular, strong inflection (-es) due to 'ein'; modifies 'Kapitel'.
Noun, neuter, nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'beginnt'.
